segments.text: in any human interaction it could be one
to one it could be one to many we are
constantly teaching people how to treat
us and what I mean by that is if you and
I are in a conversation I don't treat
you based on what I think about you no I
treat you based on what I think you
think about yourself what that means is
when we are meeting a person for the
first time we don't don't know anything
about them we don't know what's been up
what's up with their life we don't know
what they're like we don't know what
their child experiences have been like
we don't know what they feel about
themselves which means if I have to make
an opinion about you if I'm meeting you
for the first time I will turn to the
person who knows you the best to give me
an idea about you and to me the person
that knows you the best is you so
naturally I will look at you to see how
you feel about yourself and based on
that I'm make opinions about you based
on that is what I'm going to decide that
this is what I feel about you
[Music]
